title: BetaMinecart
description: Restores the latest preview update of Minecraft, removing the minecart speed limit.
body:
### Plugin Overview
- This plugin brings features from the latest Minecraft preview to older versions, allowing players to customize the minecart speed limit.
- However, please note that if the speed is too high, the minecart may derail when turning.

### Configuration File

```
# No commands are available; please restart the server after making changes

# Maximum speed, default vanilla limit is 0.4
max-speed: 100

# Speed increment, how much speed increases per block
speed-increment: 0.05
```
